title: everything bagel
description: a very large modpack that aims to add anything and everything that feels in place in vanilla minecraft while overhauling the base game significantly.
body:
# EVERYTHING BAGEL
**a 300+ mod vanilla plus / overhaul modpack**

everything bagel is a large modpack that aims to overhaul the vanilla minecraft experience while still staying faithful enough to the base game. with the modpack being basically everything and the kitchen sink, there's something for everyone to enjoy.

### features
- expanded armor trimming system
- improved and more social chat features
- tons of ways to customize your look and the way you play
    - choose an origin before you spawn in. all of which aim to change the way you play, but without any drawbacks and limitations to your playstyle. 
    - choose a class before you spawn in. letting you get bonuses in things you'd be proficient in.
    - toggleable breasts for those who feel issues like gender dsyphoria, or just for those who like having them.
    - wearable hats! they do nothing but they look cool!
    - trinkets and artifacts that further change the way you play, try and spec out your player with as much loot as you can!
    - not a fan of your current character but don't want to change worlds? you can create multiple characters in one world and swap to them with ease!
- plenty of ways to decorate your builds.
    - there are tons of block variants and decorations to make your builds a lot prettier
- improved and overhauled world generation
    - the world as well as the dimensions have been completely overhauled! now with new generation and biome, there's got to be something new that amazes and dazzles you
- improved combat mechanics
    - axes are now viable, having the same durability as swords
    - dual wielding weapons. plain and simple
- visual improvements and little things
    - there are sparkles, wakes, spawning animations, tons of new particles and effects, and tons of things that make the experience have a little bit more pizazz.
- tons of optimizations and performance tweaks
